title: Bits and Bobs: Valkyrie
description: Bits and Bobs to align with the MCValkyrie Modpack
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f19eaae3ad05571439a9cf5c3572ed01453d56b.png)

This mod adds new items ranging from a new mint crop to fufill all your minty desires, a new cake, added old and new recipes for existing blocks and a way to full automate dragons breath for a variety of items.~~~~

This mod was originally designed for the [MCValkyire](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mcvalkyrie) server/modpack but can be used on its own along with its required dependencies

## Dependencies
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Create: Confectionery](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-confectionery)
- [Create: Dragons Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-dragons-plus)
- [Create: Crafts and Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition)

### [Source](https://github.com/WateryContinent/bitsandbobs)
